content:
DEAL NOTE
Customer: Fairview Legal Group
Customer ID: C009
Contract ID: K019
Account Executive: Tom Rivera
Deal Type: Renewal + Upgrade
Date: May 1, 2024

DEAL SUMMARY
Renewed Fairview Legal Group and upgraded from InsightIQ Starter to Enterprise, expanding from 5 to 25 users. Applied 5% discount. New ARR: $34,200.

RENEWAL NOTES
Expansion reflects rollout to all four practice group leads and their senior associates. Claire Osei presented the platform's impact at their annual partners meeting, citing a 40% reduction in time spent on monthly performance reporting. The upgrade to Enterprise was required for the expanded user count and audit logging features.

NEGOTIATION NOTES
Claire requested a 10% discount citing the significant user count increase. Tom Rivera countered at 5%, noting the upgrade to Enterprise tier already provided better per-user value. Claire accepted after confirming the audit logging feature was included in Enterprise.

EXPANSION POTENTIAL
Fairview is considering expanding InsightIQ access to their paralegals in 2025, which could add another 10-15 users. Claire also mentioned a sister firm in Atlanta that she would be willing to refer if the 2025 rollout goes well.
